info.description: HTTP API gateway for auth, family tree, events and photos services.
info.title: MyForebears API Gateway

post.description: Authenticates user credentials and returns access token plus refresh cookie.
Logs out current user and clears refresh cookie.
Logs out user from all active devices and clears refresh cookie.
Uses refresh cookie and returns a new access token plus rotated refresh cookie.
Completes registration and returns access token plus refresh cookie.
Resets password with one-time link received by email.
Sends a verification code to the provided email.
Sends a password reset link to the specified email.
